summary: Full backend and frontend testing of TZOUL BARBER app. All 13 backend tests passed. Frontend homepage, booking modal, and admin login/dashboard all working correctly.

issues: Intro animation (TZOUL branding) plays on every page load including /admin route, adds ~3-4s delay before any content is interactive

critical_code_review_comments: SERVICES and BARBERS are in-memory lists — admin create/update/delete changes are lost on server restart; consider persisting to MongoDB
Server has no rate limiting on booking creation (potential spam bookings)
Resend email is intentionally disabled (no API key) — email confirmations silently fail but this is expected per requirements
seed_data_creation: Created one test booking for 2026-09-15 11:00 with TEST_User
context_for_next_testing_agent: All APIs working. Admin login at /admin, dashboard at /admin/dashboard. Booking modal has 4 steps (service→barber→date/time→details). Intro animation plays on page load (~3-4s). Backend 100% pass rate on 13 tests.
